3179880.name: Adrenalinkick
3179880.description:
Experience the Adrenaline Rush on two wheels now!

You’re faced with a decision — at an average speed of over 250 km/h, right in the middle of rush-hour traffic.

Make the wrong choice, and even your guardian angel will abandon you.

This game is inspired by the “legendary” Ghost Rider, who has already kept entire police units busy on international roads.

Important Notice:
As the developer and publisher, we strongly advise against recreating this kind of behavior in real life. Never forget: you only have one life.

Included Features:

  • Two endless tracks

  • Four selectable characters

  • “Streamer Editor”

  • Customizable track advertising

  • Customizable motorcycle design

  • Customizable license plate

  • Wheelie & stoppie mode

  • Adjustable cruise control

  • Manual weather settings in the pause menu

  • Tutorial pages explaining the streamer mode and controls

Wild swerving back and forth won’t get you to the finish line. The rule here is: drive with foresight and steer in time.
Controlling a motorcycle at over 250 km/h is a true art — it takes a steady hand and nerves of steel.

May you all reach the finish line safely — and enjoy a close race for the best distance.
